query: SELECT o.id, o.establishmentId, o.status, o.customerName, o.total, o.createdAt, e.name as establishmentName FROM orders o LEFT JOIN establishments e ON o.establishmentId = e.id ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
